What Is BodyCipher

A new language
for an ancient conversation

The human body has always been communicating. Changes in your tongue, nails, eyes, skin, and energy levels are recognized across traditional holistic practices worldwide as observable signals associated with specific organ systems and nutritional needs.

Most people never learn to read them. BodyCipher bridges that gap — not as a medical tool, but as a wellness education tool rooted in thousands of years of plant medicine tradition.

You share what your body is showing. BodyCipher observes those signals, identifies which body systems they've historically been associated with, and suggests botanicals traditionally used to provide support.

"Your body has been sending you signals your entire life. BodyCipher teaches you to finally read them."
👅
Tongue Reading
Coating, color, and shape variations observed in tongue wellness assessment traditions dating back millennia.
💅
Nail Analysis
Ridging, discoloration, brittleness — nail signals recognized across Ayurvedic and Chinese traditions.
👁️
Eye Observation
Iridology and scleral signals used in traditional wellness observation for centuries.
🌿
Symptom Inquiry
Guided assessment of energy, digestion, mood, and systemic wellness signals you've been noticing.
✦
The Process

How It Works

Three steps from signal to botanical guidance — grounded in tradition, guided by your body's own language.

I

Share Your Signals

Take or upload a photo of your tongue, nails, or eyes directly from your phone or camera — or walk through a guided symptom inquiry. No account required to start.

II

BodyCipher Reads

The app observes the visual and reported signs you provide, identifying which body systems they have historically been associated with across traditional wellness practices.

III

Receive Your Guidance

A personalized selection of botanicals from a library of over 107 herbs — each screened against your health profile for safety — with traditional use information and supportive practices.

About Our Methods

The body as
map and messenger

The human body is constantly communicating. Changes in the tongue, nails, eyes, skin, and energy levels are recognized in traditional holistic practice as observable signals associated with specific organ systems and nutritional needs.

Most people never learn to read them. BodyCipher is a wellness education tool that bridges that gap — drawing on centuries of cross-cultural botanical wisdom to give those signals meaning.

The Four Observational Pillars

01 — VISUAL OBSERVATION
Reading the Surface

Tongue coating, nail texture, scleral tinting, and skin changes have been interpreted as body-system indicators across Ayurveda, Traditional Chinese Medicine, Iridology, and Naturopathy. BodyCipher collects these visual signals through photo upload or guided self-reporting.

02 — SYMPTOM MAPPING
Listening to the Pattern

Fatigue, digestive disruption, mood shifts, and cyclical imbalances are cross-referenced against traditional organ-system associations. Your reported wellness signals are mapped to historical frameworks, not medical databases.

03 — BOTANICAL ALIGNMENT
Matching Plant to Signal

Each identified signal pattern is aligned with botanicals historically used to support the associated body systems. Over 107 herbs are documented with traditional use context, preparation methods, and culturally specific applications.

04 — SAFETY SCREENING
Caution Before Guidance

Every botanical suggestion is screened against your personal health profile. Pregnancy, ongoing medications, known sensitivities, and age-related cautions are flagged before any herb is suggested — so your inquiry stays safe and informed.

Traditions That Inform BodyCipher

India · 5,000 Years
Ayurveda

One of the world's oldest holistic healing systems, Ayurveda uses tongue reading, pulse observation, and dosha assessment to guide personalized plant medicine. BodyCipher draws on Ayurvedic signal frameworks for tongue and nail observation.

China · 3,000 Years
Traditional Chinese Medicine

TCM maps the body through meridian systems and organ correspondences, using tongue diagnosis as a primary observational tool. BodyCipher's tongue-signal library is informed by classic TCM tongue-coat and color frameworks.

Europe · 19th Century
Naturopathy & Iridology

European naturopathic traditions developed iridology — the study of iris patterns as systemic indicators — alongside broader constitutional wellness observation. BodyCipher incorporates iridological associations into its eye-signal reading module.

Global · Ancient
Indigenous Plant Medicine

Plant healing traditions from West Africa, the Amazon basin, the Caribbean, and First Nations cultures contribute significant botanical knowledge — particularly in roots, barks, and adaptogenic herbs not found in Western pharmacopeias.

Middle East · 1,200 Years
Unani & Islamic Medicine

Unani medicine, blending Greek humoral theory with Arabic botanical scholarship, contributed extensive documentation of herbs used for organ system support. Scholars like Ibn Sina (Avicenna) documented hundreds of botanical applications still referenced today.

Americas · Ancient
Mesoamerican Herbalism

Aztec, Mayan, and Andean healing traditions developed detailed plant pharmacopeias — many validated by modern research. BodyCipher's library includes botanicals from these traditions with documented traditional use for digestive, immune, and inflammatory support.

⚠ Important Wellness Disclosure

BodyCipher is a wellness education tool, not a medical device or diagnostic service. The observational readings, botanical suggestions, and wellness guidance provided through this application are for educational and informational purposes only. They are not intended to observe, support, cure, or prevent any disease or medical condition. These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. Always consult a qualified healthcare provider before beginning any herbal regimen, especially if you are pregnant, nursing, taking ongoing medications, or managing a health condition. BodyCipher does not replace professional medical advice, assessment, or care.

The Person Behind BodyCipher

About André

André
Pauls
Founder, BodyCipher
"I am not a licensed physician or herbalist. I am something different — a lifelong student of the plants, driven by genuine love for this knowledge and a deep desire to share it."

— André Pauls, Founder

30+
Years of Self-Study
100+
Herbs in the Library
∞
Curiosity for the Plants

My name is André Pauls. I have been studying herbs and natural remedies since an early age — not because I was told to, but because something in me was always drawn to the intelligence of plants and what they reveal about the body.

Over the years, that curiosity became a lifelong practice. I read everything I could find. I studied the traditions. I paid attention to what worked — for myself and for the people around me who trusted me enough to ask. That trust is something I have never taken lightly.

I developed BodyCipher because I noticed that most people who want to use herbs and natural remedies simply don't know where to start. They don't have someone in their family who passed this knowledge down. They don't have access to a practitioner. They are searching — often alone — for answers their doctor can't give them.

BodyCipher is my answer to that gap. It is not a medical tool. It is the kind of informed, caring guidance I wish more people had access to — the same knowledge I've spent a lifetime gathering, made available to anyone who is ready to listen to what their body is already saying.

A Note of Transparency

I want to be clear about who I am and who I am not. I am not a doctor, a licensed herbalist, or a medical provider of any kind. I hold no certifications. What I hold is something I believe is equally real — decades of dedicated self-education, genuine passion, and an unwillingness to stop learning.

BodyCipher was built from that place. It is an educational tool — never a substitute for professional medical care. If you are managing a serious health condition, please work with a qualified provider.

What BodyCipher offers is a starting point. A way in. A door that has always been there — to the knowledge your body already holds — now made easier to open.

André Pauls
Founder, BodyCipher

Questions

What People
Ask

No. BodyCipher is a wellness education tool, not a medical device. It does not diagnose, treat, or prescribe anything. It observes signals you share and suggests botanicals that have been traditionally used in association with those signals across multiple healing traditions. Think of it as a translation service for ancient wellness knowledge — not a doctor.

When you create a profile, you can list any ongoing medications you take. BodyCipher's botanical library includes safety flags for known herb-drug interactions — for example, herbs that may affect blood thinning, thyroid function, or blood pressure medications. Any herb with a relevant flag is noted before being suggested, so you can have a more informed conversation with your healthcare provider.

BodyCipher's 107-herb library draws on documented traditional use from Ayurveda, Traditional Chinese Medicine, Naturopathy, Unani medicine, and indigenous healing traditions across multiple continents. Each herb entry includes its cultural origin, historical application, preparation methods, and documented safety considerations. We do not make clinical efficacy claims.

BodyCipher flags pregnancy in your profile and will note pregnancy-related cautions for relevant herbs. However, you should always consult your midwife, OB, or healthcare provider before taking any botanical supplement during pregnancy. The app is informational only and does not replace specialized prenatal care.

You can start a basic symptom inquiry without an account. Creating a profile allows you to save your health information, access the full herb library, and store your wellness history across sessions. The free tier gives you meaningful access to explore the system before committing to a subscription.
